productDisplayName: Nike Men's Air Max Blue White Shoe
description: REVOLUTION COMES IN AIRY PACKAGES The nike Air Max 90 is a retro running shoe engineered with a max Air unit in the heel for ultimate cushioning and comfort. Let’s rewind a wee bit to understand what’s so special about the nike Air Max 90. Nike created its revolutionary Air Sole unit for its footwear way back in the 1970s. A decade and a half later, around 1987, the Nike Air Max shoe debuted and it’s window in the heel became an instant hit. All of a sudden shoe wearers started feeling air sole comfort, or should we say started seeing such comfort in the heel. With this revolutionary shoe becoming such a hit worldover, Nike went on to create various models on these lines, and after much research was born the Nike Air Max 90. A hit with athletes and collectors for its technology and vibrant colours, the Nike Air Max 90 is constructed using a leather upper with a polyurethane (PU) midsole and durable rubber outsole, offering comfort, durability and support at its best. Laces that suit your feet Offering a lightweight performance and cushioned ride, the Nike Air Max 90 shoe’s meshed upper and ankle area is made of leather with enhanced breathability, durability, Fit and feel. The extra eyestays provides a customized lacing and ensures a supportive fit, keeping the feet snug, supported and stable. The additional leather overlays along the edges of the shoe ensure high-quality detailing and add on a more streamlined silhouette and added support and durability to the upper. Style in the heel With the visible Max Air unit in the heel, which is the prime feature of the Nike Air Max 90, you are rest assured of absolute cushioning and protection against impact during heelstrike. The outsole is made of rubber with a waffle pattern that enhances traction and durability. With flex grooves created along the outsole, you can be absolutely assured that the Nike Air Max 90 flexes and bends naturally along with your foot, giving your strides a comfort feel. Upper Mesh and leather uppers for superior breathability and protection White lace-ups for snug fit Cushioned collar and tongue for extra comfort Appliqued logo on the heel counter and side Midsole PU midsole with Max Air unit in the heel for maximum impact protection and cushioning. Outsole Visible air unit in the heel Waffle pattern enables the outsole to grip the surface better Toe counter embedded on the upper Wash careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
